# af diff ADR-064 opinionated rendering scenarios.
#
# The fakebin directory (prepended to PATH by the testscript harness) contains
# fake git, hunk, and diffity stubs that echo their invocation arguments.
# Because the testscript runner is not an interactive TTY, af diff runs the
# non-interactive git diff --stat path by default. The --web path runs diffity.
# The hunk interactive path is covered by internal/diff unit tests.

env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $HOME/.config/af
mkdir $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo

cp state.toml $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml

# ── Scenario 1: non-interactive default → git diff --stat ─────────────────────
# No TTY ⇒ diff.Render uses non-interactive path ⇒ git diff --stat.
exec af diff demo
stdout 'fake git'

# ── Scenario 2: --base override changes the range ─────────────────────────────
exec af diff demo --base develop
stdout 'fake git'

# ── Scenario 3: --web opens diffity with base..head ───────────────────────────
exec af diff demo --web
stdout 'fake diffity'
stdout 'main\.\.feat/demo'

-- state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
name = "demo"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-22T10:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp"
branch = "feat/demo"
base_branch = "main"
